articles.title: Qualcomm’s 16-year Snapdragon recap ends with a Galaxy S27 hint - Sammy Fans
articles.description: Qualcomm posted a video on X recapping every Samsung flagship that ran on Snapdragon, which ends up teasing the potential Galaxy S27 Ultra chipset. Sixteen years is a long time in this industry, and Qualcomm knows it. The video posted by the chipmaker ends wi…

articles.title: New iPhone Ultra schematics leak, showing prior reports didn’t do it justice - PhoneArena
articles.description: The iPhone Ultra is apparently even sleeker than previous leaks had claimed.

articles.title: Astrobotic’s Detonation Engine Fires 4,000 Pounds of Thrust in Wild Test - Gizmodo
articles.description: The cutting-edge propulsion system could be used to power rockets to the Moon and beyond.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Could Come With 12GB of RAM - MacRumors
articles.description: Apple's standard iPhone 18 could feature 12GB of memory for the first time, according to analyst Dan Nystedt.   In a new post on X, Nystedt said...

articles.title: Tim Cook says Apple Maps release was a 'really big mistake' - USA Today
articles.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook said during a town hall the release of Apple Maps in 2012 was a "humble pie" moment for the company, according to Bloomberg.

articles.title: Windows Update gets new controls to reduce forced restarts - BleepingComputer
articles.description: Microsoft is rolling out Windows Update improvements that give users more control over how updates are installed while reducing disruption from frequent or poorly timed restarts.
